message:
fix(ci): gate TCP-dependent HTTP policy tests to unix only

asupersync's TCP connect is unreliable on Windows CI (os error 10053:
connection aborted). Gate tests that require successful TCP round-trips
with #[cfg(unix)]. Policy-only tests (deny before connect) still run
on all platforms.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
